title: scrophularia sanguinea
intro: Scrophularia sanguinea, also known as the red-flowering figwort, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scrophularia sanguinea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Scrophularia sanguinea can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create traditional remedies.
